title: Overlearning
script_summary: A deep dive into the science behind overlearning and its effects on memory retention.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about overlearning than social media does.
Overlearning means practicing beyond just the point of mastery.
Imagine memorizing a song perfectly, but repeating it over and over embeds it deeper in your mind.
Studies show overlearning boosts retention by up to 50%!
But here's the catch: overlearning isn’t always effective for every skill.
It’s great for memorization, yet might not improve creative thinking or problem-solving.
Curious about how to use overlearning effectively? Hit follow for more insights!
